---
name: "memory-intake"
description: "Classify incoming information and store durable learning safely."
agent: "Memory Governor"
tools: ["read", "search", "edit", "execute", "agent"]
argument-hint: "<memory report>"
---

Classify the incoming information and decide whether it belongs in memory.

Context:
- #file:AGENTS.md
- #file:.github/agents/Memory-Governor.agent.md
- #file:.github/memory/MEMORY_INDEX.md
- #file:.github/memory/self-improvement-protocol.md
- #file:docs/INFORMATION_RELAY.md

Append only durable, safe, source-labeled knowledge. Reject or redact unsafe
payloads.
